---
format:
  html:
    include-in-header:
      - text: |
          <link href="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.15/index.global.min.css" rel="stylesheet"/>
          <script src="https://cdn.jsdelivr.net/npm/fullcalendar@6.1.15/index.global.min.js"></script>
---

# 📅 Personal Calendar

Welcome to your personal calendar. This simple calendar aggregates events from one or more data sources and displays them using FullCalendar.

::: {.calendar-wrap}
<div id="calendar" style="height: 600px;"></div>
:::

```{=html}
<script>
// Events will be populated by sync_calendar.py via generated JS in this file.
const events = [];

document.addEventListener("DOMContentLoaded", function() {
  const el = document.getElementById("calendar");
  if (typeof FullCalendar === "undefined") {
    el.innerHTML = "<p style='color: red;'>FullCalendar failed to load.</p>";
    return;
  }
  const calendar = new FullCalendar.Calendar(el, {
    initialView: "dayGridMonth",
    initialDate: new Date().toISOString().slice(0, 10),
    height: "auto",
    headerToolbar: {
      left: "prev,next today",
      center: "title",
      right: "dayGridMonth,timeGridWeek,listMonth"
    },
    events: events,
    eventDisplay: "block",
    nowIndicator: true
  });
  calendar.render();
});
</script>
```

<style>
.calendar-wrap {
  max-width: 1200px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}
</style>
